query:
ALTER TABLE game_item_catalog
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stack_limit INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 99,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shop_price INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS in_normal_shop TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS in_spirit_shop TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS in_secret_shop TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_monster_drop TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_monster_id VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_rate FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS gather_locations JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS use_effect JSON DEFAULT NULL;
